description: I recommend this application for companies with individual request for effective developing of application, using interfaces and deploy on Android, Windows OS.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: + deployed for a lot of platforms (Android, Windows, iOS) + easy and fast used + a lot of functionality + support a lot of devices (PC, mobile devices,...) + stability + off-line mode + Kalipso team is working alway for new better version of application with support new futures + reasonable price + excellent support
cons: - web support and interfacing - missing support linux OS - missing proxy communication - missing direct communication without gateway - less possibilities for design settings of controls

description: It has been an excellent relationship.
author: Richard L.
pros: All the APIs work as they are supposed too. The product works as advertised. The support is person to person, which is really helpful
cons: we can always use more examples and tutorials.

description: Absolutely love everything about kalipso, we truly do love it. Only thing I would change is reducing the interval of update releases. We believe that each release should be tested absolutely thoroughly to avoid minor bugs. We have seen on a number of occasions where bugs pop up as soon as the update is installed, then reported to sysdev then again followed by a kalipso.exe update especially for that bug.
author: Marwan S.
pros: Ease of use, potential, features, functionalities, interface and more
cons: The software itself is brilliant, the developers have done an outstanding job, we have been using it for many years now and we love kalipso. It has helped us, our clients and many businesses achieve the well needed ROI. The problem we've been having for the last 2 or so years is noticing the quality of your support declining. It seems we get that brilliant response from your support department once in a while probably from that same person that we pray will respond when we need help. And sometimes inadequate response with short answers that contain no solution, no substance, half answers and no alternative resolutions to the matters unless asked over and over, and this costs us all many more unnecessary emails and time due to time difference between Australia and Portugal. We actually have a number of local kalipso users who pay us to provide them with the support they need because they say they have been extremely disappointed with sysdev support. We have emphasized this a number of times but it seems to still occur occasionally.

author: aart M.
pros: I use this software to make apps for others, I make money out of it and it returns handsomely on the investment.
cons: Kalipso is a well rounded piece of software, with good support. Somethings could be explained more, or work in an even more modern way. But overall... I'm very pleased.

description: I have done very advanced applications for Windows, Android and Apple for years and Kalipso is very stable and easy to use.
author: Ulf D.
pros: One developer system for several platforms and especially like the free license on developed applications.
cons: It is hard to be compatible to enough hardware. But ones adopted only limit is your imagination for data collection.

review_title: High profile framework for mobile app development
description: We successfully finished a large variety of mobile apps covering lots of technologies (online, offline, hybrid, web services, BC, RFID,....) and leveraged both productivity gains and reliabability of sophisticated apps as well.
author: Thomas M.
pros: Very extended range of functions to support all features and HW of data collection devices, very good balance of ready-to-use defaults and controls and of flexibility to program the business logic of an app.
cons: As we have seen in other state-of-the-art frameworks there is no traditional reference documentation. The product is to a large extend self explanatory and the manufacturer provides lots of samples and a responsive support, but you need to set aside some extra time for avoidable trial-and-error.

author: Daniel Alejandro L.
pros: No codding! Its the easiest part! just drag and drop!
cons: Reduce time! You can make a lot of products!

review_title: Software that makes developing new solutions easier on different platforms
description: We are solving problems in warehouses, event managements... very different fields but mainly with combination with barcodes.
author: Klemen U.
pros: We are using is almost 10 years. It is easy to develop software for different platforms. We started by creating demos in Kalipso, but soon we found out that we can do a real stuff in it. They are creating new functionalities which make even easier to build new solutions. Good support team!
cons: I can't remember any bad situation. Even where there were some bugs in thr kalipso studio they solved them and provide even a solution to avoid that bug until next release. Solution that is creating benefits for everyone...

author: Gustavo S.
pros: How quickly an application is returned.
cons: he miscommunicator is for windows only.

author: Robert V.
pros: Very easy to use, works on different OS. No code needed for development
cons: I miss the Version number in the name of the file, so it would be easier to find the latest version

description: Utilizo kalipso há mais de 5 anos e tenho notado a evolução do produto e a sensibilidade da equipa de desenvolvimento do produto e de suporte de ouvir as sugestões dos utilizadores para essa mesma evolução.
author: Rui M.
pros: Facilidade de desenvolvimento. Intuitivo Reduzido tempo de aprendizagem
cons: Falta de responsividade gráfica. Horizontal/Vertical, Screen size....

description: Nosotros lo utilizamos para uso interno, aplicaciones para el almacén, RRHH, gerencia, todas ellas conectadas con nuestros ERP's
author: Fernando F.
pros: Es una herramienta que permite una rápida curva de aprendizaje y desarrollo ágil en multiplataforma y se conecta fácilmente con otras herramientas.
cons: El sistema de impresión es mejorable, aunque funcional y la utilización de capacidades nativas de los dispositivos es un poco escasa.

review_title: Fast App Development Witz performante database and comm
author: Andreas Z.
cons: Documentation is often Not enough of Not Detailed

description: Mi experiencia es, en general, muy satisfactoria.
author: Rafael M.
pros: El producto es relativamente fácil de usar. Las posibilidades de aprendizaje son variadas por los videotutoriales y los cursos periódicos gratuitos.
cons: En general, cumple las expectativas, por lo menos, las que buscaba nuestro equipo.

review_title: Un soft low-code estupendo para aplicaciones móviles
description: Soft low-code muy destacable, por su curva de aprendizaje baja, conectividad a diversas bases de datos y sobre todo por su sencillez a la hora de realizar una app móvil y para escritorio.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Curva de aprendizaje baja. Rapidez en el desarrollo de app móviles, aunque también se pueden desarrollar aplicaciones de escritorio.
cons: Debería de tener una traducción al español, por lo menos la documentación.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Barcode code system integrated with ERP
description: We built a barcode system to Handel or inventory and integrate the app with our ERP system
author: Osama Q.
pros: Non code and less time and effort to build an app that handel many ERP functionality
cons: Improve the controls selection on the form so we can easly move and align them

author: Carlos M.
pros: It's simple to use, has built-in functions that covers 99% of needs. And the best thing, it compiles to multiplatform!!
cons: Nothing. I really don't have. It just works.

description: I am very satisfied to used this software.
author: Khairul B.
pros: 1. Easy to use. 2. Free trial period. 3. No need to learn Bar code. 4. Database independent. 5. Online and offline Application. 6. Diverse functionality.
cons: 1. Only English version. 2. Need more better interface.
